chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 118 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1298/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.1299/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 28.12.2023 Mr. Asif Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicants/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Through this bail application, applicants/accused (i) Noor Ahmed S/o Phullo Khan Kosh and (ii) Faiz Ahmed S/o Haji Allah Bachaya Indhar seek protective bail in Crime No.10/2023, registered at Police Station Gemro, District Ghotki U/S 365-A PPC and 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Learned Counsel submits that names of applicants do not appear in FIR, but subsequently, they have been arraigned as accused in Challan and shown absconders. They intend to appear before the Court concerned, but apprehend their immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants have been issued against them. Hence, they seek protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 28.12.2023 to 03.01.2024 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicants subject to their furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees twenty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case, if any, shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which applicants are directed to surrender before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect Cr. Bail App. No. D – 118 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicants surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

No. D – 118 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicants surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case applicants fail to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
